message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Find all a vaccination documents in EPD

actor HCP

box "Community A" #LightGray
  participant "GFPP/PIS" as GFPP #Green
  participant "Aggregator" as AGG #Green
  participant "CO-Registry" as COREG #Green
  participant "CO-Repository" as COREPO #Green
  participant "CO-IGW" as COIGW #Green
end box

box "Community X" #LightGray
  participant "OC-RGW" as OCRGW #Cyan
  participant "OC-Registry" as OCREG #Cyan
  participant "OC-Repository" as OCREPO #Cyan
end box

HCP -> GFPP : [01] Get all immunization data
GFPP -> AGG : [02] query all registries
AGG -> COREG : [03] Registry Stored Query Request [ITI-18]
COREG -> COREPO : [04] Registry Stored Query Request [ITI-18]
COREPO -> COREG : [05] Lookup Data
COREG -> AGG : [06] Registry Stored Query Response [ITI-18]
AGG -> COIGW : [07] request all communities
COIGW -> OCRGW : [08] Registry Stored Query Request [ITI-38]
OCRGW -> OCREG : [09] Registry Stored Query Request [ITI-18]
OCREG -> OCREPO : [10] Lookup Data
OCREPO -> OCREG : [10] Lookup Data
OCREG -> OCRGW : [11] Registry Stored Query Response [ITI-18]
OCRGW -> COIGW : [12] Registry Stored Query Response [ITI-38]
COIGW -> AGG : [13] end loop
AGG -> AGG : [14] Assemble Query Responses
AGG -> GFPP : [15] Registry Stored Query Response [ITI-18]
GFPP -> GFPP : [16] list of document info
GFPP -> AGG : [17] retrieve all documents
AGG -> COREPO : [18] Retrieve Document Request [ITI-43]
COREPO -> COREG : [19] Retrieve Document Request [ITI-43]
COREG -> COREPO : [20] allocate document data
COREPO -> AGG : [21] Retrieve Document Response [ITI-43]
AGG -> COIGW : [22] Retrieve Document Request [ITI-39]
COIGW -> OCRGW : [23] Retrieve Document Request [ITI-43]
OCRGW -> OCREPO : [24] allocate document data
OCREPO -> OCRGW : [24] allocate document data
OCRGW -> COIGW : [25] Retrieve Document Response [ITI-43]
COIGW -> AGG : [26] Retrieve Document Response [ITI-39]
AGG -> AGG : [27] Assemble Retrieve Responses
AGG -> GFPP : [28] Retrieve Document Response [ITI-43]
GFPP -> AGG : [29] Aggregate documents
AGG -> GFPP : [30] one FHIR ch-vacd document
GFPP -> HCP : [31] Show immunization data

@enduml
```
